CustomField.description:
When true, exceptions are re-thrown at the end of commitWork() if transaction fails. When false (default), exceptions are captured in result and transaction completes gracefully.
Use Cases: - TRUE: Integration scenarios where caller needs to catch exceptions for retry logic - TRUE: Testing scenarios where Transaction Finalizer needs exception propagation - FALSE: Async scenarios where graceful completion allows Transaction Finalizer to handle errors via result - FALSE: User-facing transactions where result-based error handling is preferred
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Re-throw exceptions on transaction failure? Default: false (graceful completion with result.transactionStatus = FAILED/ROLLED_BACK)
CustomField.label: Re-throw Transaction Exceptions
